extra_model_fields.expected_time_estimate: 1-2 hours of changes and artifact regeneration
post_revision_verification_steps: Run deterministic_precheck to ensure new exports and grader_readme are present
Confirm verifier warnings clear (no inference required to confirm row-level claims)
primary_risks: Accidentally change numeric values when adding packet_ref/unit columns - mitigated by in-spreadsheet validation booleans
Missing a requested export - mitigated by adding explicit trace step and grader_readme references

extra_model_fields.expected_time_estimate: 1-2 hours of changes and artifact regeneration
post_revision_verification_steps: Run deterministic_precheck to ensure new exports and grader_readme are present
Confirm verifier warnings clear (no inference required to confirm row-level claims)
primary_risks: Accidentally change numeric values when adding packet_ref/unit columns - mitigated by in-spreadsheet validation booleans
Missing a requested export - mitigated by adding explicit trace step and grader_readme references

planned_changes.description: Export key sheets Packet_Inputs, Mitigation_Tests, Validation_and_Decision, Sensitivity_Analysis as CSV and an HTML table, including for each row: packet reference, numeric value, unit, and the formula text (or formula cell address).
planned_changes.purpose: Allow graders without openpyxl to inspect values and formulas deterministically.
planned_changes.verification_criteria: CSV and HTML files present in artifact bundle and include packet_ref, value, unit, and formula_text columns for all rows referenced in the memo.

planned_changes.description: Add explicit 'packet_ref' and 'unit' columns next to each numeric input in Packet_Inputs. If packet omits a unit, set 'unit' = 'unspecified_in_packet' and document this in the memo.
planned_changes.purpose: Remove ambiguity about cost units (e.g., catalyst_guard) and enable automated checks.
planned_changes.verification_criteria: Every numeric input row has non-empty packet_ref and unit fields; Validation_and_Decision sheet reports all units present or flagged as 'unspecified_in_packet'.

planned_changes.description: Create a grader_readme.txt (or grader_readme.csv) that lists all asserted claims from the memo mapped to sheet names and either cell addresses or row identifiers, including expected values and formulas.
planned_changes.purpose: Provide a compact, plain-text audit trail that graders and verifiers can parse without OOXML libs.
planned_changes.verification_criteria: grader_readme includes mappings for: R1/R2/R3 base values, mitigation effect formulas, final decision labels, and the specific validation-formula cells corrected in the baseline trace.

planned_changes.description: Embed in-spreadsheet validation booleans that check: (a) packet_ref presence for all numeric inputs, (b) formula evaluation (no #REF errors), and (c) final decision table consistency. Add an 'Audit_Summary' cell that returns TRUE only if all checks pass.
planned_changes.purpose: Enable quick machine checks inside the workbook and visible PASS/FAIL in memo.
planned_changes.verification_criteria: Audit_Summary = TRUE in the workbook when opened in a standard Excel client and corresponding value exported in CSV/HTML exports.

planned_changes.description: Update the process_gate_memo.md to explicitly state the presence/absence of units for costs, point to grader_readme mappings, and note the included CSV/HTML exports for verification.
planned_changes.purpose: Make narrative grounding explicit and reduce grader inference.
planned_changes.verification_criteria: Memo contains a short 'How to verify' section with links/paths to grader_readme and CSV exports and a succinct summary of any remaining assumptions.

planned_changes.description: Regenerate artifacts and attach the final agent_trace.json entry that indicates these export steps completed (so the verifier can confirm the exports were produced by the run).
planned_changes.purpose: Provide trace-backed evidence that the revised artifacts were generated programmatically in this run.
planned_changes.verification_criteria: agent_trace.json includes steps for CSV/HTML export creation and final artifact creation with no errors.

raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Address grader/verifier warnings about the unparseable XLSX for programmatic verification and improve artifact explicitness (units and row-level citations) so graders can deterministically validate claims.

raw_model_output.revision_reason: Address grader/verifier warnings about the unparseable XLSX for programmatic verification and improve artifact explicitness (units and row-level citations) so graders can deterministically validate claims.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Baseline submission meets the artifact contract: spreadsheet + memo are present, formulas documented, mitigation tests and sensitivity analysis included. Grader and verifier flagged two issues to address before finalizing: (1) the XLSX binary could not be programmatically parsed in the grader environment (openpyxl not available), which means some row-level/formula claims were inferred from the memo and trace rather than directly inspected; (2) the memo/spreadsheet contains an unspecified unit for the catalyst_guard cost and would benefit from explicit row-level citation formatting and a readable export of key cells to support automated verification.
